text_block_list.text:
It's time for Seiun Sky's dance lesson... but we've
come to an arcade.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Yep, just like I said. The dance game here looks
perfect for practicing.
choice_data_list: Are you sure this will help?
Are you sure this will help?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Surer than sure! No doubt in my mind we're gonna
be feeling the rhythm!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: All right, let's get grooving. ♪

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Like this... now do this!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
This is harder than I thought. I might be using
more energy than I do during regular lessons.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Oh, here comes my score! I wonder how good I
did.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Huh?!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
I didn't make it onto the leaderboard... Hmph. Ah
well, this was just for fun anyways.
choice_data_list: I thought this was a dance lesson.
I thought this was a dance lesson.

text_block_list.text: Seiun Sky plays for a little while longer, but...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff... I did better this time. Now I've... gotta be... on the leaderboard.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Come on, come ooon...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: ...Wait, I'm still not up there? This "TEIO" person in first place is just too good!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
I gotta memorize the song and focus on the parts
I mess up... No, wait—is that the most efficient
way to improve?
choice_data_list: Wait, are you taking this seriously?
A little more effort and you can get the win!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Naaah, of course not! Why would I try hard for
something like this?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Well, time to call it a day. I'm about to zonk out.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: It's not like me to dance till I'm drenched in sweat!

Following this, I start hearing some firsthand
accounts of people spotting Seiun Sky at the
arcade...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Nah, I'm not trying too hard. That's not really my
kind of thing.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Still... you know how it is. I feel like I wasn't half
bad at the game.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Maybe if I practiced dancing too, I could get that
top score someday.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... Well, if you're up for it, I don't mind
keeping you company, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
But we gotta get dancing on the double, before
anyone notices us.

Very much out of character for her, Seiun Sky
practices dancing until closing time.
